description: Same as js-bypass-perm-mode-not-available-fake-ok but for the SDK/control-response code path (`!q.isBypassPermissionsModeAvailable`).

patches.search_regex: !q\.isBypassPermissionsModeAvailable\)return K\.enqueue\(\{type:"control_response",response:\{subtype:"error",request_id:\$,error:"Cannot set permission mode to bypassPermissions because the session was not launched with --dangerously-skip-permissions"\}\}\),q
patches.replace: !1&&!1)return K.enqueue({type:"control_response",response:{subtype:"error",request_id:$,error:"Cannot set permission mode to bypassPermissions because the session was not launched with --dangerously-skip-permissions"}}),q
patches.description: Second of the two call sites for the 'not launched with --dangerously-skip-permissions' error.
